meta.title: SEEMOTO KUIVURIVAHTI — AI-Powered Grain Dryer Monitoring
meta.description: The only grain dryer monitor with AI. Fire warning 10–15 min in advance. Exhaust temperature and humidity. 4G + battery. Install in under 30 min. Made in Finland.

hero.tagline: The only dryer guardian that never sleeps.
hero.subTagline: AI-powered grain dryer monitoring. Fire warning 10–15 min in advance. Install in under 30 minutes.
hero.closedRemotely: Switched to cooling mode remotely. All clear.

problem.headline: Thousands of dryers without remote monitoring. Every autumn.
problem.card1Text: During harvest season, farmers wake up at 2–4 AM to check the dryer. 4–6 weeks every autumn. Over 200 hours of lost sleep.
problem.card2Text: 60–80 grain dryer fires per year in Finland. Average damage €50,000–500,000. Main cause: unmonitored overheating.
problem.card3Text: One percentage point too dry = €300–500 loss per batch. Farmers over-dry for safety — wasting energy and grain.

features.headline: One device. Two sensors. Smart monitoring.

temp.title: Temperature + humidity
temp.text: Exhaust air temperature is the primary drying indicator. Humidity sensor provides additional data for future AI model training.

ai.title: Smart fire warning
ai.text: Detects abnormal temperature rise rates — distinguishes normal drying cycles from dangerous overheating patterns.

alert.title: Alert three ways
alert.text: Push notification, SMS and voice call. Wakes you even when your phone is on silent.

weather.title: Weather-aware drying planning
weather.text: 72h drying window forecast. Frost forecast. Lightning storm alert. NordPool electricity price.

fourG.title: 4G + 8h battery
fourG.text: Works without home network. Device stays operational during power outages — sends alerts as soon as 4G connectivity is available.

install.title: Install in under 30 min
install.text: 1) Attach sensor to exhaust duct. 2) Insert SIM card. 3) Download app & pair device. 4) Set alert thresholds. No electrician needed.

ce.title: CE + Made in Finland
ce.text: Industrial standards. Operating temperature -40°C to +70°C (per component specifications).

brand.title: Works with all brands
brand.text: Antti, Mepu, Opico — brand doesn't matter. If it has an exhaust duct, SEEMOTO KUIVURIVAHTI fits.

weather.headline: What's the best drying time today at your farm?
weather.lightningClear: No thunderstorms in your area for the next 48h

sensor.headline: Designed in Finland, together with farmers
sensor.battery: 8h battery — device stays operational during power cuts

testimonial.title: Real customer: Veijo Huju's dryer. August 2025. 6,478 measurements.
testimonial.quote: For the first time in 15 years, I slept through the night during harvest season. When the alert came at 3:47 AM, I switched the dryer to cooling mode from my phone. Didn't need to get out of bed.
testimonial.name: Veijo Huju

pricing.headline: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subsidy: KUIVURIVAHTI may qualify for Finnish Food Authority agricultural digitalization support. Contact us for details.

roadmap.headline: The more dryers we monitor, the smarter the system gets.

items.title: Fire warning
items.text: Temperature anomaly detection and abnormal rise trend identification

items.title: Dryness prediction
items.text: Predicting drying time based on exhaust air data

items.title: Energy optimization
items.text: Drying parameter optimization based on electricity price and weather forecast

sensorReveal.headline: Built to endure
sensorReveal.subtitle: 4G connectivity, dual sensors, AI — all in one IP67-rated device.

contact.headline: Contact us
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours.

about.headline: Who we are
about.text: SEEMOTO is a Finnish technology company developing AI-powered monitoring solutions for agriculture. KUIVURIVAHTI was born in collaboration with farmers — from real needs, for real problems.

footer.tagline: Your dryer guardian — see everything, wherever you are.
footer.company: © 2026 MWW / SeeMoto Oy. Made in Finland.
